summary: Vertical handheld footage of the state arrival ceremony for King Charles and Queen Camilla at the White House: a military jet flyover above the Washington Monument, then Trump and Melania standing with the King and Queen on the South Portico balcony with the presidential seal, US and UK flags, and a Marine band. It is a single continuous recording of the ceremony with no editing or titles.
notable_text: RT @JamesBlairUSA: 'Welcoming the King & Queen to The White House.'
